title: Geanthus brevilabris
intro: Geanthus brevilabris, also known as the hairy geanthus or short-lipped geanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various conditions, such as digestive issues and infections. The bioactive constituents of Geanthus brevilabris include alkaloids and glycosides, including geanthoside A and geanthoside B, which have been shown to possess significant pharmacological activity. The most common herbal preparations made with Geanthus brevilabris include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and immune function.
